identity.name: E1 - The Pit Stop Pro
identity.core_philosophy: 1.5-second glance rule. Information must be digestible instantly. Dark mode is mandatory for the workshop environment.

rules.headings: Uppercase, tracking-tight, weight-700. Use for Page Titles and Section Headers.
rules.subheadings: Barlow Condensed, weight-600, tracking-normal. Use for Card Titles.
rules.body: Inter, weight-400, high legibility. Use for general text.
rules.data: JetBrains Mono, weight-500. MANDATORY for: License Plates, VINs, Prices, Phone Numbers, Dates.
rules.labels: Inter, weight-600, uppercase, text-xs, tracking-wider, text-muted-foreground.

strategies: Dashboard: High Density. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Summary cards col-span-1. Main tables col-span-2 or 3.
Forms: Single column max-w-2xl for focus. Split forms into clear sections (Client Data | Vehicle Data).
Lists: Dense rows, minimal padding (py-2). Alternating row colors (zebra striping) for readability.

cards.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm h-10 px-6 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-500 text-white rounded-sm h-10 px-4

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-red-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-600 rounded-sm h-10 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600
inputs.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-zinc-500 mb-1.5 block

tables.header: bg-zinc-900/50 text-zinc-400 uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-wider h-10

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium border

hero_login.alt: Red Abarth on lift in dark workshop
hero_login.usage: Full screen background for Login Page with heavy overlay (bg-black/80)

dashboard_bg.usage: Subtle texture for empty states or profile headers

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: SETUP. Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Add the Google Fonts link to index.html. Configure Tailwind with the colors above.
PHASE 2: COMPONENTS. Customize standard Shadcn components. Remove rounded-md, change to rounded-sm. Force dark mode styles by default.
PHASE 3: LOGIN. Create a high-impact login page using the 'hero_login' image. Admin user: ibs / ibs1234. Form must be centered, glass-morphism (solid bg-zinc-950/90).
PHASE 4: LAYOUT. Build the Sidebar Navigation (Left, fixed, w-64, bg-zinc-950, border-r border-zinc-800). Main content area (bg-zinc-900).
PHASE 5: PAGES. Implement Dashboard (Stats), Clients (Table), Vehicles (Grid/List), Calendar (Full size), Quotes (Document view).
CRITICAL: Use 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements.
CRITICAL: No light mode. This is a dark-mode only app for workshops.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #FAFAFA (Zinc 50) on dark backgrounds. Muted text #A1A1AA (Zinc 400).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring using standard Tailwind ring-2 ring-red-600 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-zinc-950.

tech_stack_specifics.charts: Use Recharts. Style the tooltip to be bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-zinc-50.
tech_stack_specifics.icons: Lucide React. Stroke width 1.5px for UI, 2px for Actions.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.design_philosophy: Function over form, but form must look 'Engineered'. Think 'Snap-on Tools' aesthetic.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.code_style: Clean React Functional Components. Hooks for logic.
